pr.title: sobjlib: decompile SObj setup and render paths
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2485 decompiled SObj setup/render code in src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.c, added SObj descriptor and color typing in sobjlib.h, and adjusted GX texture format typing in extern Dolphin GX headers/source plus one tobj.c callsite. The PR body claims 100% objdiff for HSD_SObjLib_803A477C and HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC, a 99.88707% near-match for HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, and .data/.sdata2 100%; bot output corroborates new sobjlib matches and the 99.89% improvement for HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; implements HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, near-matches HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, updates HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC matching shape, adds SObj constants, includes, and internal define.
Adds HSD_SObjDesc typing, color unions for HSD_SObj byte fields, and an SOBJLIB_INTERNAL-gated typed prototype for HSD_SObjLib_803A477C.
Updates GXInitTexObjCI callsite to pass imagedesc->format without GXCITexFmt cast after GX texture format type consolidation.
Consolidates GXCITexFmt values into GXTexFmt by removing the separate GXCITexFmt typedef block.
Changes GXInitTexObjCI prototype parameter from GXCITexFmt to GXTexFmt.
Updates GXInitTexObjCI definition parameter type from GXCITexFmt to GXTexFmt.
Adds external-source formatting guard with DisableFormat true and SortIncludes false.

what_changed: Replaced placeholder comment for HSD_SObjLib_803A477C with a typed implementation that allocates an HSD_SObj, initializes primary and optional secondary texture objects, initializes default transform/color/state fields, computes texture coordinate scale from GX texture dimensions, links the SObj to a GObj, and returns it.

Replaced placeholder comment for HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 with a large render-path implementation that configures GX vertex descriptors, z texture/state, TEV stages, texture loading, blend mode, rotated quad coordinates, and cleanup state; PR body labels it a 99.88707% near-match.
Updated HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC by changing far_val from literal 2.0f to a volatile const f32 load from HSD_SObjLib_804DEA98; PR body claims this function is now 100%.
Removed prior todo comments describing near-match/register-stack issues for HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4 and HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC.
Added SObj data constants HSD_SObjLib_804DEA80 through HSD_SObjLib_804DEA98 and removed a data_pad_jumptable placeholder in the shown diff.
Added HSD_SObjDesc and color unions in HSD_SObj so render code can use x38_color and x3C_color while retaining byte field access.
Added SOBJLIB_INTERNAL in sobjlib.c so sobjlib.h exposes a typed internal prototype for HSD_SObjLib_803A477C while preserving the less-typed external prototype outside that internal scope.
Merged CI texture enum values into GXTexFmt and updated GXInitTexObjCI declaration, definition, and tobj.c callsite to use GXTexFmt.
Added extern/.clang-format to disable formatting and include sorting under extern.
smart_moves: The typed HSD_SObjDesc and HSD_SObj color unions let the new SObj implementations express descriptor/image/tlut/color access directly instead of relying only on raw integers or byte fields.
The internal-only HSD_SObjLib_803A477C prototype keeps the implementation strongly typed where SOBJLIB_INTERNAL is defined while avoiding a broader public signature change in the header.
The GXInitTexObjCI signature and tobj.c callsite were updated together with the enum consolidation, reducing the need for casts at callsites shown in the diff.

The PR records narrow verification: pre-commit on touched baselib files, configure+ninja in a dev worktree, a touched sobjlib.o build, and objdiff percentages for the named functions and data sections.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function proves a local descriptor shape, adding a small typed descriptor and union views can make the implementation clearer while preserving offset-compatible byte access.

SDK-adjacent type cleanups may need to be applied consistently across enum definitions, function prototypes, function definitions, and existing callsites to remove casts introduced by earlier incomplete typing.
Keep near-match status explicit when a large render function improves substantially but is not fully matched; the PR body and bot report both distinguish HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 from the 100% functions.

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style function names such as HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, and HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC are retained rather than renamed semantically.
New struct and local names use subsystem vocabulary where supported: HSD_SObjDesc, image, tlut, image2, sobj, inv_width, inv_height, use_secondary.
Union field names add semantic color views x38_color and x3C_color while retaining original offset byte names x38 through x3F.
The internal prototype guard is named SOBJLIB_INTERNAL, matching the translation unit/subsystem name rather than a generic private flag.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(0x20) is used inside HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, which remains a near-match at 99.88707% rather than a claimed full match.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Existing standards require explicit verifier evidence for PAD_STACK; PR evidence includes objdiff percentage but not a detailed explanation of why the padding is required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC uses a volatile const f32 load from HSD_SObjLib_804DEA98 for far_val instead of an inline 2.0f literal.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is a narrow codegen tactic supported by the PR's claimed 100% objdiff for the function, but the slice does not include a reviewer explanation.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Color constants are loaded into GXColorS10/GXColor via u32 casts before GXSetTevColorS10 and GXSetTevKColor calls.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The evidence shows the shape but does not prove whether it is ideal source style beyond this PR.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A generated-looking data_pad_jumptable placeholder is removed and concrete SObj constants are defined in the TU.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR body claims .data/.sdata2 100%, but the intake slice should not generalize this into a data-ownership rule.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev bot reported +612 matched code bytes, +304 matched data bytes, four new matches in main/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib including HSD_SObjLib_803A477C and data sections, and a 99.89% improvement for HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68.
No review comments or human review feedback are present in the loaded PR slice.

notes: Changed-file metadata, PR body, diff excerpts, and bot report provide strong evidence for file changes, claimed match percentages, and affected symbols.
The raw diff loaded in the prompt was truncated, but targeted reads recovered the sobjlib.h and tobj.c portions needed for header/callsite details.
No human review comments are available; reviewer intent and acceptance rationale cannot be inferred.
The PR body reports a known Wine server crash during a clean upstream-branch full rebuild after many objects; changed object and dev-worktree build are reported as passing.
HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 is explicitly a near-match, so its PAD_STACK and render shape should not be treated as a finished global style precedent.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use offset-preserving typed views when a decomp proves local data shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2485 added HSD_SObjDesc and GXColor union views for HSD_SObj fields so SObj setup/render implementations could use descriptor and color semantics while retaining offset byte access.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep near-match labels explicit for tactic-heavy render code
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2485 records HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 as a 99.88707% near-match while separately claiming 100% for HSD_SObjLib_803A477C and HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC; this avoids treating PAD_STACK-backed near-match code as fully resolved.

source_update_candidates.title: Use PR #2485 as an example for narrow matching tactics with explicit objdiff scope
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2485 contains PAD_STACK(0x20) in a 99.88707% near-match render function and a volatile const f32 load in a function claimed 100%; it may be useful as an example under matching-tactics-need-evidence, emphasizing that such tactics need narrow objdiff evidence and should not be generalized without cleanup rationale.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR demonstrates both supported and cautionary tactic use, but the source standard should be curated rather than automatically updated.

source_update_candidates.title: extern/.clang-format disables formatting and include sorting for extern subtree
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2485 adds extern/.clang-format with DisableFormat: true and SortIncludes: false.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a path-specific formatting fact visible in the diff; curator should decide whether it belongs in path facts.

source_update_candidates.title: GXInitTexObjCI uses GXTexFmt after GX CI texture format consolidation
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2485 removes the separate GXCITexFmt typedef from GXEnum.h by folding GX_TF_C4/GX_TF_C8/GX_TF_C14X2 into GXTexFmt, then updates GXInitTexObjCI declaration, definition, and a tobj.c callsite to use GXTexFmt.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a candidate SDK typing/path fact, not a general decomp standard.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK in HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 as accepted style; the function is only a near-match and the slice lacks detailed rationale.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale because the loaded slice has no review comments.
Do not generalize volatile const f32 loads as a standard fix for float literals; the evidence only supports this narrow HSD_SObjLib_803A55DC change with claimed objdiff success.
Do not treat the SObj field names x10/x14/x18/etc. as semantically recovered beyond the few added descriptor/color names shown in the diff.
